text: I know what you have been doing, Montague. Working with my cousin behind our backs.
Tybalt, it is not what you think. We are building something that could benefit both companies.
Benefit? You are stealing our IP. I have already flagged this to our legal team.
Back off, Tybalt. Romeo has not stolen anything. They built something new together.
Stay out of this, Mercutio. And consider your consulting contract with us terminated.
You cannot fire me for telling the truth. This is ridiculous.
